'''鈭歡-l-h''' ('''kagalah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeehah|yeehah]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeehah|yeehah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-l-h
|-
! Lemma
| kagalah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigalah|thigalah]] || [[word:jigalah|jigalah]] || [[word:shigalah|shigalah]] || [[word:kigalah|kigalah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugalah|thuthugalah]] || [[word:jujugalah|jujugalah]] || [[word:shushugalah|shushugalah]] || [[word:kukugalah|kukugalah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugalah|thugalah]] || [[word:jugalah|jugalah]] || [[word:shugalah|shugalah]] || [[word:kugalah|kugalah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugalah|thugalah]] || [[word:jugalah|jugalah]] || [[word:shugalah|shugalah]] || [[word:kugalah|kugalah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegalah|thegalah]] || [[word:jegalah|jegalah]] || [[word:shegalah|shegalah]] || [[word:kegalah|kegalah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogalah|thothogalah]] || [[word:jojogalah|jojogalah]] || [[word:shoshogalah|shoshogalah]] || [[word:kokogalah|kokogalah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogalah|thogalah]] || [[word:jogalah|jogalah]] || [[word:shogalah|shogalah]] || [[word:kogalah|kogalah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogalah|thogalah]] || [[word:jogalah|jogalah]] || [[word:shogalah|shogalah]] || [[word:kogalah|kogalah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]] || [[word:galah|galah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙galah|th忙galah]] || [[word:j忙galah|j忙galah]] || [[word:sh忙galah|sh忙galah]] || [[word:k忙galah|k忙galah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagalah|thathagalah]] || [[word:jajagalah|jajagalah]] || [[word:shashagalah|shashagalah]] || [[word:kakagalah|kakagalah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagalah|thagalah]] || [[word:jagalah|jagalah]] || [[word:shagalah|shagalah]] || [[word:kagalah|kagalah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagalah|thagalah]] || [[word:jagalah|jagalah]] || [[word:shagalah|shagalah]] || [[word:kagalah|kagalah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagalah|shagalah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagalah|goshagalah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagalah|gokishagalah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagalahn眉|shagalahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagalahnkn眉|goshagalahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalahn眉|gokishagalahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagalahsh毛|shagalahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagalahnksh毛|goshagalahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagalahsh毛|gokishagalahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalahro|shagalahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalahnkro|goshagalahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalahro|gokishagalahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalahmu|shagalahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalahnkmu|goshagalahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalahmu|gokishagalahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagalahsher|shagalahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagalahnksher|goshagalahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagalahsher|gokishagalahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagalahng|shagalahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagalahnkng|goshagalahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagalahng|gokishagalahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagalahya|shagalahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagalahnkya|goshagalahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagalahya|gokishagalahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagalahyam|shagalahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagalahnkyam|goshagalahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagalahyam|gokishagalahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalahn眉sh毛|shagalahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalahnkn眉sh毛|goshagalahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalahn眉sh毛|gokishagalahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalahn眉ro|shagalahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalahnkn眉ro|goshagalahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalahn眉ro|gokishagalahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalahn眉mu|shagalahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalahnkn眉mu|goshagalahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalahn眉mu|gokishagalahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalahsh毛n眉|shagalahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalahnksh毛n眉|goshagalahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalahsh毛n眉|gokishagalahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalahsh毛ro|shagalahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalahnksh毛ro|goshagalahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalahsh毛ro|gokishagalahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalahsh毛mu|shagalahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalahnksh毛mu|goshagalahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalahsh毛mu|gokishagalahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalahron眉|shagalahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalahnkron眉|goshagalahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalahron眉|gokishagalahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalahrosh毛|shagalahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalahnkrosh毛|goshagalahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalahrosh毛|gokishagalahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalahromu|shagalahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalahnkromu|goshagalahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalahromu|gokishagalahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalahmun眉|shagalahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalahnkmun眉|goshagalahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalahmun眉|gokishagalahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalahmush毛|shagalahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalahnkmush毛|goshagalahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalahmush毛|gokishagalahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalahmuro|shagalahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalahnkmuro|goshagalahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalahmuro|gokishagalahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
